subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.14
question_html:
Which equation represents hydration enthalpy?

A.  Na+ (g) → Na+ (aq)

B.  Na+ (aq) → Na+ (g)

C.  NaCl (s) → NaCl (aq)

D.  NaCl (aq) → NaCl (s)
examiners_html: 65% of the candidates recognized the equation that represents hydration enthalpy. The most commonly chosen distractor was an enthalpy of solution.
